finding_ref.description: Reference to the finding being validated (finding_id, file+line, or index).

verdict.description: Validation verdict: confirmed (real vuln), false_positive (not exploitable), uncertain (cannot determine).

reasoning.description: Detailed reasoning for the verdict. What was checked, why the verdict was reached.

evidence_contradiction.description: Evidence that contradicts the original finding, if applicable.

confidence_adjustment.description: Adjusted confidence score after validation (0.0 to 1.0).

requires_re_hunt.description: Whether this finding should trigger a re-hunt with adjusted scope.

re_hunt_scope.description: Adjusted scope hint for re-hunt if required.
